name: LBank API Vocabulary
description: Domain vocabulary for LBank cryptocurrency exchange API concepts and terminology

terms.definition: A trading pair identifier composed of base currency and quote currency separated by underscore (e.g. eth_btc means ETH priced in BTC).
A unique identifier issued to authenticated users for accessing private API endpoints. Must be paired with a request signature.
A cryptographic signature computed over the request parameters to authenticate the caller. LBank supports RSA asymmetric signatures and HmacSHA256 symmetric signatures.
A K-line (candlestick) bar representing price movement over a defined time interval. Each bar contains [timestamp, open, high, low, close, volume].
The order book showing outstanding bid and ask orders at various price levels. Used to assess market liquidity and price impact.
A summary of 24-hour trading statistics for a pair including latest price, high, low, volume, turnover, and change percentage.
Total traded value in the quote currency over a 24-hour period (sum of price × quantity for all trades).
24-hour trading volume measured in base currency units.
The quantity of an order that has already been filled (executed) in base currency.
The volume-weighted average price at which an order was filled.
A UUID-format unique identifier assigned to each order by LBank at creation time.
Numeric code indicating current order lifecycle state: -1=Cancelled, 0=Open, 1=Partially filled, 2=Fully filled, 3=Partially filled and cancelled, 4=Cancelling.
Immediate-Or-Cancel order type. Executes immediately for whatever quantity is available, then cancels the remainder.
Fill-Or-Kill order type. Must be fully filled immediately or the entire order is cancelled.
A post-only order type that is cancelled if it would execute immediately as a taker, ensuring the order only adds liquidity to the order book.
Leveraged token products traded on LBank that track a multiple of the underlying asset's daily return.
WebSocket subscription field specifying the trading pair for streaming data, concatenated with an underscore.
WebSocket subscription type for streaming K-line (candlestick) data in real time.
Short code identifying a cryptocurrency asset on the LBank platform.
Unique numeric identifier assigned to each withdrawal request.
Blockchain transaction hash (TxID) for a completed withdrawal, used to track the transaction on-chain.
Asymmetric cryptographic signature scheme supported by LBank for API request authentication using a public/private key pair.
Symmetric cryptographic signature scheme supported by LBank using a shared secret key and SHA-256 hash function.
terms.fullName: Hash-based Message Authentication Code with SHA-256
